cards.name: 5 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: end of conflict, cooperation, agreements, truces, harmony, peace, avoiding conflict

cards.name: 9 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: being guarded, living beyond means, material instability, reckless spending, superficiality

cards.name: Ace of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: coldness, emptiness, emotional loss, blocked creativity, feeling unloved, gloominess
